creator: alexander.nusov@nfvexpress.com
text:
Created attachment 181571
libvirt 3.2.0

This PR updates libvirt to 3.2.0 and also adds autoport feature for VNC

Plus I removed the dependency on emulators/qemu because libvirt actually doesn't require to have qemu installed.

This change will allow the user to choose between emulators/qemu and emulators/qemu-devel branch.
